sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93902" key="shta/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σητάω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σής</etym>) <sense id="n93902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fret</tr_>, of moths, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
